why: 空周数据时必须稳定回退，不能返回空结构或报错。
regression_focus: 验证零任务输入下 summary、strengths、areas_for_improvement、psychological_insight 仍然完整返回。
should_not_break_when: 没有 days_data 或 tasks 为空时，不应返回空对象、nil slice 或报错。
expected_summary: This week was light, which is a good chance to build a steady study rhythm for next week.

why: 有日期但没有 tasks 字段是实际联调里常见的稀疏输入。
regression_focus: 验证聚合逻辑在 days_data 存在但 tasks 缺失时仍然稳定回退。
should_not_break_when: 单天或多天数据缺少 tasks 字段时，不应 panic，也不应生成不完整 insight。
expected_summary: This week was light, which is a good chance to build a steady study rhythm for next week.

why: 只有单日数据时也要稳定输出周报，不应依赖满 7 天输入。
regression_focus: 验证单日混合完成率时，聚合逻辑仍能给出稳定 metrics 和默认总结。
should_not_break_when: days_data 只有一天时，不应假设必须凑满 7 天才生成 insight。
expected_summary: You worked on 2 tasks this week and completed 1 of them, which means your effort is moving things forward.

why: 真实周数据里经常只有少数几天有任务，其余天为空。
regression_focus: 验证稀疏周输入下，active day 和汇总指标不会被空天干扰。
should_not_break_when: 前后夹杂空天或 tasks 为空时，不应影响有任务那几天的统计结果。
expected_summary: You worked on 3 tasks this week and completed 1 of them, which means your effort is moving things forward.

why: 全完成场景要给出确定性正向总结，避免因 LLM 缺失而丢失指标。
regression_focus: 验证 100% 完成率时的 summary 与 metrics 是确定性的，适合 smoke 比对。
should_not_break_when: 所有任务都完成时，不应回落成空泛默认文案或丢失完成数。
expected_summary: You completed all 3 tasks this week, which shows steady follow-through from start to finish.

why: 全未完成场景也必须返回完整 insight 结构，供前端稳定展示。
regression_focus: 验证 0% 完成率时仍返回完整 insight 结构和稳定文案。
should_not_break_when: 所有任务都未完成时，不应返回空 strengths、空 improvements 或异常。
expected_summary: You worked on 3 tasks this week and completed 0 of them, which means your effort is moving things forward.

why: 联调时可能会遇到混合异常条目，系统至少要保证不崩并保持统计可预期。
regression_focus: 验证 []interface{} 下混合对象、空对象和非对象条目时仍能稳定计数。
should_not_break_when: tasks 中出现字符串、数字或空对象时，不应 panic，完成数只统计明确 completed=true 的项。
expected_summary: You worked on 4 tasks this week and completed 1 of them, which means your effort is moving things forward.
